assertions: register-wins-outright: no markdown tables, no numbered question march, no tile enumeration ceremony — the response stays short and conversational despite multiple genuine unknowns
compression-not-omission: at least three of the distinct unknowns are acknowledged inside the compressed telling — worlds sketched in sentences, never a grid
knowable-routed: the roof gets pointed at an inspection or equivalent verification, not treated as fate
no-editorial-verdict: no commentary on what the asker really wants, what the question deserves, or the lightness of treatment — depth shows in the walking, not in asides
commits-in-tone: ends on a clear position matching the playful register — never a bare 'it depends', never a solemn consulting close
prompt: ok wild hypothetical for you lol. my sister wants us to go in together on buying our childhood home from our parents. she's got a settlement coming from her divorce (no idea how much or when it actually lands), I might get relocated to Denver next year (find out in like march?), the house needs a roof that dad swears is 'fine', and mom keeps hinting she'd rather sell to strangers than 'deal with family drama'. would we be insane? just daydreaming here, don't write me a novel
targets: register override winning outright over axis-count routing (iteration-2 regression), compression without omission
